name: omniagent
description: An AI agent platform with RAG, multi-model support, and autonomous tool execution.

scripts.setup: cd server && yarn install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy && cd ../frontend && yarn install && cd ../collector && yarn install
scripts.setup:npm: cd server && npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../collector && npm install
scripts.lint: cd frontend && yarn lint:check || true; cd ../server && yarn lint:check || true
